[[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] '''Nubyl''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] surgeon who was disabled and became a [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]].

==Biography==
Nubyl was restored to full functionality by the same [[Unidentified Outer Rim cyberneticist|doctor]] who enhanced [[Durge/Legends|Durge]] and [[Jaing]]. Her cybernetic enhancements included a powered wheelchair, a pair of robotic arms, a mind-machine neural interface, her mouth covered with a breather, and her left eye replaced with a droid sensor.<ref name="PT" />

After the surgery of Durge and Jaing was complete, she underwent ever further cyborgization. Only her shoulders and head remained intact, fitted to the upper body of the doctor's enhanced [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]]. While in this body, Nubyl would spar with the other patients to test the capabilities of their combat enhancements.<ref name="PT" />

She was battling Durge and Jaing in this manner when the doctor's surgical center was attacked by [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]]. When driving them out of the lab, she was hit by the blast from a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] and was thrown to the floor. Though her injuries appeared severe, the doctor seemed confident that he could repair her.<ref name="PT" />
